blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
